summary: Story Generator standalone page testing completed successfully. All features working: Dashboard loads presentations from MongoDB, clicking a presentation navigates to create page and loads assets from SharePoint, video generation produces WebM that gets converted to MP4 via backend FFmpeg, and download button provides MP4 file.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in Dashboard.jsx line 52: Changed 'filteredData.length' to 'data.length' (filteredData was undefined)
Dashboard requires localStorage 'userName' or 'viewAll=true' to load presentations - this is expected behavior based on the app's user filtering logic
seed_data_creation: None - used existing presentations (Valley Craft, Monkey Pants, WP Gilbert)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Generator standalone page at /story-generator is fully functional. Key flow: Dashboard loads presentations via storyGeneratorAPI.getPresentations() -> Click presentation navigates to /story-generator/create with presentation data in state -> Create page loads assets from SharePoint via storyBuildsAPI.getBuildAssetUrls() -> VideoEncoder generates WebM using MediaRecorder -> Backend /api/story-generator/convert-to-mp4 converts to MP4 using FFmpeg -> Download button provides MP4 file. Video generation takes 30-60 seconds.
